title: Cuneiform Tablet #0027: Neo-Babylonian Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
